data.title: Esports firm's stock surges by 100% post investing in Bitcoin, Ethereum treasury; Nasdaq-listed company reports on Friday.
data.description: On Friday, an esports company listed on Nasdaq revealed its decision to invest in Bitcoin and Ethereum for its treasury. Following this announcement, the company’s stock saw a remarkable increase of 100%.

data.title: EA SPORTS™ NHL® 26 debuts globally today on PlayStation®5 & Xbox Series X|S, offering new features like ICE-Q 2.0 tech, Be A Pro mode, and HUT Seasons. Early start before the NHL® 2025-26 season.
data.description: Today, Electronic Arts Inc. has officially released EA SPORTS™ NHL® 26 globally on PlayStation®5 and Xbox Series X|S. The game, part of the NHL® franchise, allows players and hockey enthusiasts to showcase their talent, style, and narratives by saying “Check My Game.” Launching ahead of the NHL® 2025-26 regular season, the game features ICE-Q 2.0 technology, an updated Be A Pro mode, and new HUT Seasons. NHL 26 provides fans with an early start to the hockey season, arriving three weeks prior to the start of the new season.

data.title: French company is complying with financial market regulations on voting rights and shares capital.
data.description: As per the provisions of articles L.233-8 II of the French Commercial Code and 223-16 of the General Regulation of the French Financial Markets Authority (Autorité des Marchés Financiers), companies are required to disclose important financial information to the regulatory authorities.

data.title: F.D.A. is reviewing reports of COVID vaccine deaths, examining possible links to birth defects and child fatalities. More info at C.D.C. panel meeting.
data.description: Next week, an influential C.D.C. panel meeting will feature the agency presenting information on birth defects and fatalities in children that may be related to the vaccines. This report is anticipated to include important statistics and details on these cases.

data.title: Polymarket partners with Chainlink for precise prediction market resolutions, giving Chainlink control over users' price forecasts.
data.description: Polymarket is changing its resolution process by entrusting Chainlink with the oversight of price forecasts made by certain users.

data.title: Survey of 1,000 US workers by ResumeTemplates.com finds growing dependency on ChatGPT for basic tasks like writing emails.
data.description: A recent survey conducted by ResumeTemplates.com in Seattle on September 12, 2025, discloses a concerning trend of skill deterioration among AI users. The study involved 1,000 full-time employees in the United States who interact with AI chatbots on a weekly basis. The findings indicate a growing reliance on AI technology for even the simplest of tasks. This portrays a worrying pattern of dependence on AI assistance among users, highlighting the need for continued monitoring and intervention.

data.title: Upcoming cargo mission to ISS will carry dozens of experiments, including edge computing, in-space manufacturing, NSF-funded research, biomedical investigations, and space debris mitigation. Scheduled to launch on September 14 at 6:11 p.m. EDT.
data.description: Kennedy Space Center in Florida will be hosting a mission on September 14 at 6:11 p.m. EDT, where various payloads will be launched. These payloads will showcase edge computing, in-space manufacturing, NSF-funded research, biomedical investigations, and space debris mitigation. The mission is a part of NASA's collaboration with Northrop Grumman Commercial Resupply. The wide range of payloads highlights the importance of innovation and research in space exploration.

data.title: China is a key contributor to global growth and stability, aiming for high-quality development. President Xi Jinping emphasizes certainty and opportunity.
data.description: On September 12, 2025, in Beijing, China, amidst significant global transformations, the country remains a pillar of stability and progress, emphasizing certainty, opportunities, and forward-looking advancement. President Xi Jinping of China highlighted the nation's commitment to high-quality development, stating that China continues to navigate challenges to ensure a prosperous future. The remarks were made against the backdrop of China's prominent position in the world, reflecting on the country's unwavering pursuit of growth and leadership. The event underscored China's resilience and focus on sustainable development as it plays a pivotal role in shaping the international landscape.

data.title: Kroger beats Q2 earnings, reports $1.04 EPS, strong ID sales growth; Outperform rating with $82 PT.
data.description: Kroger Co (NYSE: KR) reported a strong performance in the second quarter, attributed to its robust business momentum and effective execution, as stated by Telsey Advisory Group. Analyst Joseph Feldman, who covers Kroger, has maintained an Outperform rating and a price target of $82 for the company. Kroger surpassed expectations by reporting adjusted earnings of $1.04 per share, outperforming the consensus of 99 cents per share. This achievement was primarily due to substantial growth in identical sales (ID), as highlighted by Feldman. The notable increase in ID sales, excluding fuel, was a key driver behind the company's success. For more details, refer to the complete news article on financial website Benzinga.com.
